title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Join our core engineering team to build scalable web applications. You will work on frontend performance optimization and backend API design.

title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Help us build the next generation of user interfaces with React and Tailwind CSS. Great opportunity for CS undergraduates.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Assist in data cleaning, model building, and result visualization for our client analytics platform.

title: Backend Engineering Intern
description: Work on distributed systems and microservices architecture to support millions of users.

title: Full Stack Developer Intern
description: Contribute to e-governance platforms by developing full-stack features using MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js.

title: UI/UX Design Intern
description: Collaborate with our product team to design intuitive and engaging user experiences for our mobile apps.
